description_long: This is a bulbous ceramic vase with a narrow neck and a wide, rounded body, featuring a matte finish. The upper neck is adorned with three horizontal white stripes on a reddish-brown background, giving it a classic decorative touch. The main body displays a stylized, painterly scene that appears to depict a sunset or sunrise over water, with a kite flying in the sky and a silhouetted figure on the shore. The color palette includes earthy browns, whites, grays, and a striking red line that wraps around the body, enhancing its visual interest. The surface is smooth and hard, typical of glazed pottery, and the opening at the top is wide enough for floral arrangements or decorative branches. This vase would be a striking accent in an urban outdoor or indoor setting, such as a plaza, park, or modern lobby.
description: A rounded ceramic vase with a narrow neck, decorated with white stripes and a painterly sunset scene featuring a kite and shoreline. Earthy tones and a red accent line add visual interest.
description_view_0: The front view shows the kite, red line, and silhouetted figure against a sunset sky, with the white-striped neck clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the continuation of the red line and the more abstract, muted painterly textures, with less detail than the front.
description_view_2: The back view displays the widest part of the vase, dominated by abstract brushstrokes and the red line, with no distinct figures or motifs.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the transition between the detailed scene and the more abstract side, with the red line curving across a lighter background.
attribute_pattern: painterly landscape with kite and stripes
